title: Biostatistician I
description: Memorial Sloan Kettering seeks a Biostatistician I to support clinical and translational research with rigorous statistical analysis and study design.
responsibilities: Design statistical analysis plans for clinical trials and research studies
Analyze complex datasets using advanced statistical methods
Prepare statistical reports and presentations for researchers and sponsors
Collaborate on protocol development and regulatory submissions
Validate data quality and troubleshoot analytical issues
Stay current with statistical methodologies and oncology research trends

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
